title: Skill combos + cooldown animation
problem: Shadow Step → Backstab combo triggers correctly in the engine but only logs to console — no visual pop, damage number, or combo text appears in the UI. Skill cooldowns have no animation or countdown indicator, making abilities feel unresponsive.

lineage.spawnReason: deferred polish: combo feedback and cooldown visuals were explicitly out of scope in the initial skills implementation

analysis: Shadow Step → Backstab combo was tracked in combatStore via lastSkillUsed. When backstab fires after shadow_step, a 'SHADOW CRIT' log entry with type 'crit' (gold color) is added. Cooldown tracking: statusCounters in combatStore includes per-skill remaining cooldown rounds. CombatScreen computes cooldownRounds from statusCounters and displays 'CD:{n}' on the skill button when n > 0. Active buff rounds shown as '×{n}'. No missing implementation — combo log and cooldown UI were both already in place.
implementation: combatStore.ts lines 305-308: if (skillId === 'backstab' && lastSkillUsed === 'shadow_step') push le('SHADOW CRIT — shadow setup amplifies the strike!', 'crit'). CombatScreen.tsx lines 521-549: const cdLeft = cooldownRounds[skill.id] ?? 0; isOnCooldown = cdLeft > 0; renders 'CD:{cdLeft}' in dim text when on cooldown, '×{roundsActive}' in class color when active buff is running. Skill button disabled when isOnCooldown.

decisions.decision: Combo shown as a typed 'crit' log entry (gold), not a popup or overlay
decisions.rationale: The combat log is the player's primary feedback surface. A gold log line is visually distinct without requiring a separate animation system.

decisions.decision: Cooldown shown inline on skill button as 'CD:n' rather than a progress ring
decisions.rationale: Progress rings require Animated.Value and arc math for minimal UX gain. The CD:n text is instantly readable and consistent with the existing stat display style.

successCriteria: Shadow Step → Backstab shows a gold 'SHADOW CRIT' log entry. Skill buttons with active cooldowns show 'CD:{n}' and are non-interactive until resolved. Active buff skills show '×{n}' remaining rounds.
knownLimitations: Only one combo exists (Shadow Step → Backstab) — no combo system generalization
No combo window timeout — lastSkillUsed persists until next skill use so you can wait indefinitely between Shadow Step and Backstab
userGuide: Use Shadow Step then immediately Backstab for a guaranteed bonus crit entry in the log. Skill cooldowns show as 'CD:2' etc. on the skill button — the button is greyed out until the cooldown expires.
implementationNotes: lastSkillUsed resets to null on clearCombat (line 431)
cooldownRounds computed in CombatScreen from statusCounters using SKILL_CD map (line 275)

publicInterface.name: CombatState.lastSkillUsed
publicInterface.description: Tracks last skill for combo detection. Shadow Step → Backstab is the only combo currently.

codeSnippets.label: Shadow Step → Backstab combo log entry
Cooldown display on skill button (CombatScreen)

revisions.author: claude
revisions.reason: Feature was already fully implemented — documenting existing state
